story.body: Grafta Clinic was founded with the vision of merging the deep expertise of leading specialists with a modern clinical infrastructure. From hair restoration to plastic surgery and medical aesthetics, we deliver a wide range of services. We craft personalised treatment plans for every patient, focusing on natural and lasting outcomes.

hair-transplant.title: Hair Transplant
hair-transplant.shortDescription: Natural-looking hair restoration with FUE, DHI and Sapphire techniques.
hair-transplant.metaTitle: Hair Transplant (FUE, DHI, Sapphire) — Grafta Clinic Istanbul
hair-transplant.metaDescription: Natural results in hair transplant with FUE, DHI and Sapphire FUE techniques. Expert team, certified clinic. Free consultation at Grafta Clinic.
hair-transplant.heroSubtitle: Stop hair loss with FUE, DHI and Sapphire FUE techniques. A natural, permanent hairline using your own follicles.
hair-transplant.description: Hair transplant is the procedure of relocating healthy follicles, typically harvested from the donor area at the back of the scalp, to areas of thinning or recession. At Grafta Clinic we apply FUE, DHI and Sapphire FUE techniques and select the most suitable method for each patient, preserving the natural angle and density of hair.
benefits: High graft capacity in a single session

process.description: Hairline design, donor area assessment and technique selection.
Local anaesthesia and donor area preparation.
Follicles harvested one by one with a micromotor.
Micro-channels created with the natural direction and angle.
Follicles implanted with a DHI pen or implanter.
Long-term follow-up at month 1, 3, 6 and 12.

faq.question: Will there be visible scars?
faq.answer: FUE and DHI techniques do not leave a visible scar. Pinpoint marks in the donor area fade quickly.

faq.question: When will results show?
faq.answer: New hair starts growing from month 3-4; final result becomes visible by month 12.

faq.question: Will the transplanted hair fall out?
faq.answer: Grafts taken from genetically resistant areas are permanent; the initial 'shock loss' in the first weeks is normal.

faq.question: How long does the operation take?
faq.answer: Typically 6-8 hours, depending on the number of grafts.

beard-transplant.title: Beard Transplant
beard-transplant.shortDescription: A permanent solution for sparse or patchy beard areas via FUE.
beard-transplant.metaDescription: Beard transplant for sparse areas with natural density. FUE technique, expert surgeon, lasting result. Free consultation at Grafta Clinic.
beard-transplant.heroSubtitle: A permanent solution with natural direction and density for genetic or scar-related sparse beard areas.
beard-transplant.description: Beard transplant is mostly performed with the FUE technique. Grafts harvested from the donor area are placed in the beard region following the correct angle and direction. The result is natural and shavable.

process.description: Beard line drawn following facial proportions.
Suitable grafts selected from the donor area.
Follicles harvested with a micromotor.
Each follicle placed at the natural angle.
Aftercare and follow-up in the first week.

faq.question: Can I shave after a beard transplant?
faq.answer: Yes, transplanted hairs can be shaved comfortably from month 6.

faq.question: Is it painful?
faq.answer: The procedure is painless under local anaesthesia.

faq.question: When will I see the final result?
faq.answer: Final density and naturalness appear at months 8-12.

eyebrow-transplant.title: Eyebrow Transplant
eyebrow-transplant.shortDescription: Natural density for the brow line: a permanent restoration.
eyebrow-transplant.metaDescription: Eyebrow transplant for thin, sparse or scar-affected brows. Micro-design, expert surgeon, permanent result. Grafta Clinic.
eyebrow-transplant.heroSubtitle: Permanent restoration with natural direction and density for brows lost to genetics, trauma or over-plucking.
eyebrow-transplant.description: In eyebrow transplant, single follicular units harvested from the donor area are placed in the brow region at micro-angles. The outcome is harmonious with facial expression, naturally dense and permanent.

process.description: Drawing aligned with facial proportions and approval.
Single follicles collected.
Implantation observing direction and angle.
Reviews at month 1, 3 and 6.

faq.question: Will the eyebrow hairs grow?
faq.answer: Yes, since they originate from the donor area; they grow like hair and need regular trimming.

faq.question: How many follicles are needed?
faq.answer: Usually 200-400 follicles for both brows.

alopecia-treatment.title: Alopecia Treatment
alopecia-treatment.shortDescription: A dermatological and medical approach to localised hair loss.
alopecia-treatment.metaDescription: Dermatological care, intralesional injections and combination protocols for alopecia areata. Under specialist supervision.
alopecia-treatment.heroSubtitle: Scientific, individually tailored treatment protocols for autoimmune-related localised hair loss.
alopecia-treatment.description: Alopecia areata is an autoimmune condition presenting as round or oval patches of hair loss on the scalp. Treatment includes dermatological assessment, intralesional steroid injections when appropriate, topical therapies and combinations with PRP/mesotherapy.

process.description: Dermoscopy and laboratory tests where needed.
Subtype classification (areata, totalis, universalis).
Selection of intralesional or topical therapy.
Monthly reviews with plan adjustments.

faq.question: Does alopecia come back?
faq.answer: With the right treatment, regrowth is achieved in most patients; recurrences are possible in some cases.

faq.question: How long does the treatment take?
faq.answer: Typically 3-12 months depending on the subtype.

prp-therapy.title: PRP Therapy
prp-therapy.shortDescription: Hair and skin rejuvenation with plasma derived from your own blood.
prp-therapy.metaDescription: Stop hair loss and renew your skin with PRP. Growth factors derived from your own blood. Specialist supervision.
prp-therapy.heroSubtitle: Strengthen hair follicles and skin with platelet-rich plasma obtained from your own blood.
prp-therapy.description: In PRP (Platelet-Rich Plasma) therapy, platelet-rich plasma separated from the patient's own blood via centrifugation is microinjected into areas with hair loss or signs of ageing. The growth factors support follicular nourishment and tissue renewal.
benefits: From your own blood — zero allergy risk

process.description: A small blood sample is taken.
Plasma is separated from the platelets.
Microinjections into the scalp or skin.
Usually 3-4 sessions, then maintenance.

faq.question: Is PRP painful?
faq.answer: Discomfort is minimal with topical anaesthesia.

faq.question: How often is it needed?
faq.answer: Initially 3-4 sessions every 2-4 weeks, then a refresher every 6 months.

mesotherapy.title: Mesotherapy
mesotherapy.shortDescription: Nourishing vitamin/mineral cocktails for hair and skin.
mesotherapy.metaDescription: Personalised vitamin/amino acid cocktails for hair loss and skin renewal via mesotherapy. Grafta Clinic specialists.
mesotherapy.heroSubtitle: Combinations of vitamins, amino acids and hyaluronic acid that nourish hair follicles and skin.
mesotherapy.description: Mesotherapy is the application of bespoke cocktails into the scalp or face via micro-needles. It is effective in slowing down hair loss and restoring radiance and hydration to the skin.
benefits: Quick application, immediate return to social life

process.description: Cocktail selection based on skin/hair analysis.
Superficial injections via micro-needles.
Typically once a week, 4-6 sessions.

faq.question: Are there side effects?
faq.answer: Apart from temporary redness, side effects are rare.

faq.question: When will results appear?
faq.answer: After 1-2 sessions for skin, after 4-6 sessions for hair.

fillers-botox.title: Fillers & Botox
fillers-botox.shortDescription: Injectables that smooth lines and restore volume.
fillers-botox.metaTitle: Botox and Filler Treatments — Grafta Clinic
fillers-botox.metaDescription: Soften expression lines with Botox, restore volume with fillers. Natural results, expert specialist. Grafta Clinic Istanbul.
fillers-botox.heroSubtitle: Medical aesthetic injectables that preserve a natural look while addressing expression lines and volume loss.
fillers-botox.description: Botox softens the lines on the forehead, between the brows and around the eyes. Hyaluronic acid fillers add natural volume to the cheekbones, lips, chin and cheeks. All treatments are administered under specialist supervision using certified products.

process.description: Facial analysis and treatment map.
Precise injection with fine-tip needles.
Day 10-14 review with optional touch-ups.

faq.question: How long does Botox last?
faq.answer: Typically 4-6 months, after which it can be repeated.

faq.question: Are fillers permanent?
faq.answer: Hyaluronic acid fillers are absorbed by the body within 6-18 months.

youth-vaccine.title: Youth Vaccine
youth-vaccine.shortDescription: A bio-regenerative treatment for skin elasticity and glow.
youth-vaccine.metaDescription: Restore skin structure from within with the youth vaccine. Profhilo and similar bio-regenerative applications. Grafta Clinic.
youth-vaccine.heroSubtitle: Bio-regenerative treatments that support the skin's own collagen production from within.
youth-vaccine.description: The youth vaccine is the application of cocktails containing hyaluronic acid and multiple vitamins/amino acids (e.g. NCTF, Profhilo) that diffuse across the layers of the skin and support collagen and elastin production. It is not a permanent filler — it repairs the skin's own structure.
benefits: Effective on neck and hands as well

process.description: Assessing the skin's age and needs.
Microinjections distributed on the surface.
Typically two sessions, four weeks apart.

faq.question: How long does it last?
faq.answer: The first series lasts 6-9 months; an annual maintenance is recommended.

faq.question: Who is it suitable for?
faq.answer: From the late twenties onward, anyone wishing to maintain skin elasticity.

rhinoplasty.title: Rhinoplasty
rhinoplasty.shortDescription: A surgical plan for a natural nose in harmony with your face.
rhinoplasty.metaDescription: Functional and aesthetic excellence with rhinoplasty. Open and closed techniques, expert plastic surgeon. Grafta Clinic.
rhinoplasty.heroSubtitle: Natural, harmonious results in line with your facial features — function and aesthetics together.
rhinoplasty.description: Rhinoplasty is plastic surgery aimed at altering the shape, size or function of the nose. At Grafta Clinic the procedure is planned with both open and closed techniques, considering both aesthetics and breathing function. In cases requiring septoplasty, a combined treatment is possible.

process.description: 3D analysis and assessment of facial proportions.
Choosing open/closed technique, aligning expectations.
General anaesthesia, 2-3 hour procedure.
Splint for the first week, social return in 7-10 days.
Reviews at month 1, 3, 6 and 12.

faq.question: When are the results final?
faq.answer: Visible improvement in 1 month; final result by month 12.

faq.question: What is the recovery time?
faq.answer: Social life in 7-10 days; sports in 4-6 weeks.

faq.question: Are both techniques permanent?
faq.answer: Yes, both techniques deliver permanent results.

breast-aesthetics.title: Breast Aesthetics
breast-aesthetics.shortDescription: Expert surgery for augmentation, reduction and lift.
breast-aesthetics.metaTitle: Breast Aesthetics (Augmentation, Reduction, Lift) — Grafta Clinic
breast-aesthetics.metaDescription: Augmentation, reduction and lift for breast aesthetics. CE/FDA-certified implants, expert plastic surgeon. Grafta Clinic.
breast-aesthetics.heroSubtitle: Natural results in harmony with your body for augmentation, reduction and lift surgeries.
breast-aesthetics.description: Breast aesthetics covers different techniques such as augmentation, reduction and mastopexy (lift). The technique of choice depends on the patient's anatomy, skin structure and expectations. At Grafta Clinic, only CE/FDA-certified implants are used.

process.description: Anatomical measurements and goal setting.
Selection of implant type/shape/placement.
1-3 hour operation under general anaesthesia.
Support bra and follow-ups for the first 6 weeks.

faq.question: How long do implants last?
faq.answer: Modern implants can last 10-15 years or longer; routine check-ups are advised.

faq.question: Will it affect breastfeeding?
faq.answer: When the right technique is chosen, breastfeeding is generally not affected.
